dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Hey Ben, did you hear Chrome 150 came out today with new stuff for developers?
dialogue.chinese: 嘿 Ben，你听说 Chrome 150 今天发布了吗？它为开发者带来了新东西。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Yeah, I saw a post about it. What’s new? It sounds exciting for all of us. It will help us a lot.
dialogue.chinese: 是的，我看到了一篇帖子。它有什么新功能？听起来对我们所有人都很令人兴奋。它会帮助我们很多。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: There’s better memory debugging for coding agents, like a detective finding hidden leaks in your code.
dialogue.chinese: 有更好的内存调试功能，针对编程代理，就像侦探找出代码里的隐藏漏洞。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: That sounds useful. What else is in the update for developers like us today? We should test them.
dialogue.chinese: 听起来很有用。对我们这样的开发者，今天的更新还有什么？我们应该测试它们。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: They added AI help widgets, kind of like smart helpers that give you design tips.
dialogue.chinese: 他们添加了 AI 帮助小部件，有点像能给你设计建议的智能助手。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Oh, I love that! Does it work for editing CSS in the Styles panel right away?
dialogue.chinese: 哦，我好喜欢！它可以马上在样式面板里编辑 CSS 吗？

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Yes, you can edit container rules and custom functions there, like fixing a box’s size.
dialogue.chinese: 是的，你可以在这里编辑容器规则和自定义函数，就像调节盒子的大小。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Anything about making code maps clearer, like a guide that shows each piece of code for me?
dialogue.chinese: 有没有让代码地图更清晰的功能？就像给我展示每段代码的指南？

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Yes, source maps are improved, so debugging feels like following a clear trail for you.
dialogue.chinese: 是的，源代码地图改进了，所以调试对你来说就像跟着清晰的路径走。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: I also heard security got a boost. What does that mean for my sites, for us?
dialogue.chinese: 我还听说安全性提升了。这对我的网站、对我们意味着什么？

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: It means Chrome protects your code from bad tricks, like a guard at a gate.
dialogue.chinese: 意思是 Chrome 保护你的代码免受恶意手段，就像门口的保安。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: And what about screen readers? Are they supported right now in this version?
dialogue.chinese: 那屏幕阅读器呢？在这个版本里它们现在能被支持吗？

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Yes, screen‑reader support is better, so blind users can hear the page better now in Chrome.
dialogue.chinese: 是的，屏幕阅读器的支持更好了，所以盲人用户现在在 Chrome 里能更好地听到页面内容。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Wow, this update looks solid. Should I try it today to see the new tools on my laptop?
dialogue.chinese: 哇，这个更新看起来很扎实。我今天应该在笔记本上试试新工具吗？

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Definitely! Install Chrome 150 and open DevTools to test the new features for yourself right away.
dialogue.chinese: 当然！安装 Chrome 150 并打开开发者工具，马上自己试试新功能。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Thanks, Mia! I’ll grab it now and let you know how it goes later soon.
dialogue.chinese: 谢谢 Mia！我马上下载它，稍后会告诉你进展如何。
